title: CopyConfig
description: config/copy.json - all user-facing copy bags (baked into the bundle). Human-edited (CLAUDE.md #6). success/encourage/hero/share/credits are the contract blocks the frontend copy test pins; clues + grid copy are additive UI blocks. Top-level additionalProperties is open because copy blocks are added per feature.

evolution.change: Initial machine-checkable formalization of config/copy.json: success[], encourage[], hero[] (short lines), share{title,line,streak}, credits{intro,license}, plus additive clues{} and grid{} UI copy blocks.
evolution.why: Copy is baked and shipped, so a missing share template or credits block must fail fast (CLAUDE.md #6); feature rows add copy blocks, so extra keys stay tolerant.
